# Meegrow Labs

> Meegrow Labs is an AI automation studio that turns natural-language descriptions of real-world workflows into secure, production-grade automated systems for finance, operations, product, and customer teams. We also publish "Zero to AI Hero", a free bilingual (English + हिंदी) course that teaches anyone to use and build with AI from scratch.

## Core

- [Meegrow Labs — AI Automation Studio](https://meegrowlabs.com/): What we do — custom agentic AI workflows, platform integrations, and bespoke automation systems for modern teams.
- [Contact / Start a project](https://tally.so/r/444qZ5): Intake form to scope an automation engagement.

## Zero to AI Hero (free course)

- [Course hub](https://meegrowlabs.com/learn/): 150+ free, ~2-minute lessons taking absolute beginners from "what is a file?" to building with AI. Every lesson is available in English and हिंदी.
- [Watch the full course on YouTube (English)](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5ogw-CYz9s83NYo3HsDHQqsuUwJ-qxa7)
- [पूरा कोर्स देखें (हिंदी)](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5ogw-CYz9s-G3UreFbcfFhMPLQRsc70U)

## Writing

- [Meegrow Labs Blog](https://blog.meegrowlabs.com): Guides and deep-dives on AI automation and the fundamentals taught in Zero to AI Hero.

## Notes

- Course narration is AI-generated; all content is human-reviewed.
- Canonical host is https://meegrowlabs.com (non-www).
